effects.effect: Take 1 Action Card from your Deck and place it on the top of your Deck.

effects.name: Quicken Plus+
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur is played: Apply Quicken to your [Invertebrate] Vivosaurs. While you control this Vivosaur, Quicken applied to [Invertebrate] Vivosaurs have 2 turn counters, instead of 1.

effects.name: Dikelo Attack
effects.effect: Deal 40 damage to a Vivosaur, except the defending Vivosaur.

effects.name: Thunderbolt
effects.effect: Flip a coin, if heads: apply Excite to the defending Vivosaur.
